title: Rule-Obj-Model
description: JSON schema for creating or updating a Pega Data Transform rule (Rule-Obj-Model). Fields marked x-pega-autoFill are injected by the builder and may be omitted from payloads.

pyModelName.description: Internal name of the data transform (PascalCase or camelCase, no spaces).

pyRuleName.description: Internal rule name. Always the same value as pyModelName.

pyClassName.description: The Pega class this data transform applies to (e.g., 'MyOrg-MyApp-Work-MyCase').

pyDescription.description: Developer-facing description of the data transform's purpose.

pyDataModelFormat.description: Format type — 'Clipboard' (standard mapping) or 'JSON' (JSON serialization/deserialization). Determines which body field is used.

pyCallSuperClassModel.description: When 'true', Pega also executes the parent class's Data Transform of the same name (inheritance chaining).

pyRuleSet.description: Rule set the data transform is saved to.

pyUsage.description: Extended free-text notes (may contain newlines; shown in the Data Transform editor).

pyProperties.description: Clipboard format only. Ordered mapping steps (Embed-ModelParams). For JSON format, this must be an empty array.

pyMappingModel.description: JSON format only. Nested Rule-Obj-Mapping-JSON object defining the JSON field mappings.

pyParameters.description: Declared input/output parameters. Required for JSON DTs (jsonData + executionMode); optional for Clipboard DTs.

pyPagesAndClasses.description: Named pages used by this data transform, with their classes.

ModelStep.description: A single step in the data transform (Embed-ModelParams). Steps can be nested via pyProperties.

pyPropertiesName.description: Target property path, page reference, condition expression, Data Transform name, or comment text — meaning depends on pyActionName.

pyPropertiesValue.description: Value expression or source reference — meaning depends on pyActionName. Empty for most structural actions.

pyProperties.description: Child steps. Used by structural actions (UPDATE_PAGE, APPEND_AND_MAP_TO, APPEND_TO, WHEN, OTHERWISE_WHEN, OTHERWISE, FOR_EACH_PAGE_IN); empty array for leaf actions (SET, EXIT_MODEL, EXIT_FOR_EACH, REMOVE, COMMENT, APPLY_MODEL, SORT).

pyDisabled.description: When 'true', the step is skipped at runtime.

pyRelationNameUpdatepage.description: UPDATE_PAGE only. 'BLANK' = clear the page's existing data before applying child SET steps (fresh initialization); 'WITH_VALUES_FROM' = copy all properties from a source page (name in pyPropertiesValue, no dot prefix) to the target page (pyPropertiesName), child pyProperties must be empty; '' = update the page in place.

pyRelationNameAppend.description: APPEND_AND_MAP_TO / APPEND_TO / FOR_EACH_PAGE_IN. Determines the source of pages. For APPEND actions: 'NEW_PAGE' = append single new empty page; 'EXISTING_PAGE' = copy an existing page (APPEND_TO only); 'CURRENT_SOURCE_PAGE' = append current iteration page (APPEND_TO only, inside FOR_EACH); 'EXISTING_PAGE_LIST' = append all pages from a source list. For FOR_EACH_PAGE_IN: indicates the iteration source type (typically 'EXISTING_PAGE_LIST').

pyRelationNameWhen.description: When rule name for step-level condition. Step is skipped if the When rule evaluates false. Distinct from WHEN action type.

pyUpdateSourceContext.description: FOR_EACH_PAGE_IN only. 'true' = property refs resolve against each iterated page. 'false' or omitted = refs resolve against the primary page. Optional — the server accepts FOR_EACH_PAGE_IN steps without this field.

pyUpdateContextOptions.description: UPDATE_PAGE / APPEND_AND_MAP_TO only. Controls which context advances when descending into a nested JSON node. 'JSON' = JSON context descends, clipboard target stays at the current page (use when traversing nested response objects to reach scalar leaves). 'CLIPBOARD' = clipboard target descends, JSON stays at the current node. '' (BOTH, platform default) = both contexts move together (use when mapping a nested JSON object onto an embedded clipboard page). NESTED-OBJECT MAPPING: dotted-path expressions in pyPropertiesValue are silently skipped at runtime — descend one level per step using this field instead.

pyAppendAndMapToOptions.description: APPEND_AND_MAP_TO only. Iteration mode over a JSON array source. 'PAGEGROUPS' = iterate JSON array of objects, create one clipboard page per element (use for multi-element responses). 'ARRAYS' = iterate JSON array of arrays. 'SCALARS' = iterate JSON array of primitives. '' (default) = MAP_TO_OBJECTS — no iteration; only first array element is mapped (non-deterministic for multi-element arrays). UPDATE_PAGE does NOT iterate; use this field on APPEND_AND_MAP_TO to capture every element.

pyClassName.description: APPLY_MODEL: class to resolve the called data transform. APPEND_TO: optional class context for the appended page (usually empty).

pyModelName.description: APPLY_MODEL only. Name of the called data transform.

pyPassCurrentParameterPage.description: APPLY_MODEL only. 'true' = pass current parameter page through, 'false' = build new from step's pyParameters.

pyParameters.description: APPLY_MODEL only. Parameter values to pass to the called data transform.

pyAppendActionWhenProp.description: APPEND_AND_MAP_TO / APPEND_TO. Property condition for conditional append. When set, the append is only executed if the condition evaluates to true. Usually empty.

pySortActionPropList.description: SORT only. List of sort criteria applied in order. Each entry specifies a property and direction.

MethodParam.description: A parameter entry (Embed-MethodParams). Used for both rule-level parameter definitions and APPLY_MODEL step-level parameter values.

pyParametersParamDefaultValue.description: Default value expression (fallback only — NOT used for explicit parameter passing in APPLY_MODEL steps).

pyParametersParamValue.description: APPLY_MODEL step-level only. Runtime value expression passed to the called Data Transform. Required parameters are validated against this field.

ModelSortParam.description: A sort criterion (Embed-ModelSortParams). Specifies a property and direction for SORT steps.

pySortActionProp.description: Property to sort by (dot-prefixed relative to the page list, e.g. '.pySeverity').

MappingModel.description: JSON format body (Rule-Obj-Mapping-JSON). Used when pyDataModelFormat is 'JSON'.

pyClassName.description: Applies-to class — required for property resolution in JSON mappings.

pyTopLevelElement.description: Root JSON element type. 'Object' = root is a JSON object; 'Array' = root is a JSON array (requires pyArrayElements and pyListProperty).

pyArrayElements.description: Array only. Element type in the root JSON array. 'Objects' = array of objects; 'Scalars' = array of primitive values. Defaults to 'Objects' when pyTopLevelElement is 'Array' and omitted.

pyListProperty.description: Array only. Page list property that receives the array elements (e.g. '.pxResults').

pyDateFormat.description: Date format for date/time values in JSON. Required — empty string causes runtime IllegalArgumentException in ClipboardJSONMapAssembler.handleSettings. 'Pega' = Pega internal format (default); 'Default' = platform default format.

pyAutomapAll.description: Auto-map all JSON fields to matching properties.

pyPropertiesName.description: Root property name (empty for root mapping).

pyPageRef.description: Root page ref (empty for root mapping).

pyDisabled.description: When 'true', this mapping entry is skipped.

pyEmptyBehavior.description: Behavior when the JSON value is empty/null. 'SKIP' = leave clipboard property unchanged; 'SET_DEFAULT' = set to default value.

pyProperties.description: Child mapping entries for nested objects/arrays. Used by APPEND_AND_MAP_TO and UPDATE_PAGE to define sub-mappings.
